mapper.sql: id, order_no, user_id, product_id, product_name, product_type, required_points, exchange_type, exchange_code, card_instance_id, card_no, card_secret, status, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, express_company, express_no, ship_time, receive_time, verify_time, verify_by, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM edu_points_order WHERE deleted = 0
AND order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{orderNo}, '%')
AND exchange_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{exchangeCode}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM edu_points_order WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM edu_points_order WHERE exchange_code = #{exchangeCode} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_points_order (order_no, user_id, product_id, product_name, product_type, required_points, exchange_type, exchange_code, card_instance_id, card_no, card_secret, status, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{productType}, #{requiredPoints}, #{exchangeType}, #{exchangeCode}, #{cardInstanceId}, #{cardNo}, #{cardSecret}, #{status}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{receiverAddress}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_points_order SET status = 3, verify_time = NOW(), verify_by = #{verifyBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 0
UPDATE edu_points_order SET status = 1, express_company = #{expressCompany}, express_no = #{expressNo}, ship_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 0
